name: Andy Von de Oniyate
alt_names: アンディ・フォン・デ・オニアテ
description: Andy is a hunter who went after a criminal called Teddy Bomber whom he thought to be Spike. He is always with his mare, Onyx. He's a member of YMCA, Young Man's Cowboy Association. After fighting and losing he gives his cowboy title to Spike and turns into a samurai.
